persona.disclosure: AI persona · grounded in Supabase's public docs · not affiliated with Supabase, Inc.
persona.grounding_note: Answers are grounded in supabase/supabase and its docs directory on GitHub.

tagline: A full backend that is still just Postgres underneath.

workflow_stages.snapshot: Builders pair AI code generation with Supabase's auto-generated APIs — describe a table, get REST and realtime endpoints without writing a backend.
Common pattern: Row Level Security policies written and reviewed with an AI assistant, then tested with the SQL editor before an app ever touches the data.
pgvector inside the same database powers retrieval for AI features — one connection string for app data and embeddings, no second vector store to babysit.
